languages.text: "Да, это я передавала вражеским войскам координаты для нанесения воздушных ударов. Ты меня разоблачил{mf||а}. Довол{mf|ен|ьна}?" {n}Наследница очень четко произносит каждое слово.{/n} "Но знай, что я делаю это ради спасения династии".
languages.translation_comment:
Играет DL_JuvennaSuspicionSabotage
стартует DL_KnowJuvennaTraitor и Obj1_Add_SabotagedAirDefence

Играет DL_JuvennaSuspicionSabotage
стартует DL_KnowJuvennaTraitor и Obj1_Add_SabotagedAirDefence

languages.text: "Yes, I was the one who transmitted coordinates for air strikes to enemy troops. You have unmasked me. Are you satisfied?" {n}She enunciates each word crisply.{/n} "But know that I am doing this to save the dynasty."
languages.original_text: "Да, это я передавала вражеским войскам координаты для нанесения воздушных ударов. Ты меня разоблачил{mf||а}. Довол{mf|ен|ьна}?" {n}Наследница очень четко произносит каждое слово.{/n} "Но знай, что я делаю это ради спасения династии".

traits.locale_text: "Yes, I was the one who transmitted coordinates for air strikes to enemy troops. You have unmasked me. Are you satisfied?" {n}She enunciates each word crisply.{/n} "But know that I am doing this to save the dynasty."

"Yes, I was the one who transmitted coordinates for air strikes to enemy troops. You have unmasked me. Are you satisfied?" {n}She enunciates each word crisply.{/n} "But know that I am doing this to save the dynasty."

"Yes, I was the one who transmitted coordinates for air strikes to enemy troops. You have unmasked me. Are you satisfied?" {n}She enunciates each word crisply.{/n} "But know that I am doing this to save the dynasty."

languages.text: «Sí, fui yo quien transmitió las coordenadas de los asaltos aéreos para las tropas enemigas. Me ha descubierto. ¿Satisfech{mf|o|a}?». {n}Pronuncia cada palabra con claridad.{/n} «Pero que sepa que hago esto para salvar a la dinastía».
languages.original_text: "Yes, I was the one who transmitted coordinates for air strikes to enemy troops. You have unmasked me. Are you satisfied?" {n}She enunciates each word crisply.{/n} "But know that I am doing this to save the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: «Sí, fui yo quien transmitió las coordenadas de los asaltos aéreos para las tropas enemigas. Me ha descubierto. ¿Satisfech{mf|o|a}?». {n}Pronuncia cada palabra con claridad.{/n} «Pero que sepa que hago esto para salvar a la dinastía».

languages.text: “没错，是我向敌方提供了空袭坐标。你已经揭穿我了。现在满意了？”{n}她一字一句说得清晰又冷静。{/n}“但你要知道，我这么做是为了挽救王朝。”
languages.original_text: "Yes, I was the one who transmitted coordinates for air strikes to enemy troops. You have unmasked me. Are you satisfied?" {n}She enunciates each word crisply.{/n} "But know that I am doing this to save the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: “没错，是我向敌方提供了空袭坐标。你已经揭穿我了。现在满意了？”{n}她一字一句说得清晰又冷静。{/n}“但你要知道，我这么做是为了挽救王朝。”

languages.text: « Oui, c'est moi qui ai transmis aux troupes ennemies les coordonnées des frappes aériennes. Me voilà démasquée. Êtes-vous {mf|satisfait|satisfaite} ? » {n}Elle articule soigneusement chaque mot.{/n} « Quoi qu'il en soit, sachez que mon seul but est de sauver la dynastie. »
languages.original_text: "Yes, I was the one who transmitted coordinates for air strikes to enemy troops. You have unmasked me. Are you satisfied?" {n}She enunciates each word crisply.{/n} "But know that I am doing this to save the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: « Oui, c'est moi qui ai transmis aux troupes ennemies les coordonnées des frappes aériennes. Me voilà démasquée. Êtes-vous {mf|satisfait|satisfaite} ? » {n}Elle articule soigneusement chaque mot.{/n} « Quoi qu'il en soit, sachez que mon seul but est de sauver la dynastie. »

languages.text: "Evet, hava saldırıları için düşman birliklerine koordinatları ileten bendim. Maskem düştü. Memnun musunuz?" {n}Her kelimeyi net bir şekilde telaffuz ediyor.{/n} "Fakat bilesiniz ki bunu hanedanlığı kurtarmak için yapıyorum."
languages.original_text: "Yes, I was the one who transmitted coordinates for air strikes to enemy troops. You have unmasked me. Are you satisfied?" {n}She enunciates each word crisply.{/n} "But know that I am doing this to save the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Evet, hava saldırıları için düşman birliklerine koordinatları ileten bendim. Maskem düştü. Memnun musunuz?" {n}Her kelimeyi net bir şekilde telaffuz ediyor.{/n} "Fakat bilesiniz ki bunu hanedanlığı kurtarmak için yapıyorum."

languages.text: "Ja, ich habe feindliche Truppen mit Koordinaten für Luftangriffe versorgt. Ihr habt mich durchschaut. Seid Ihr jetzt zufrieden?" {n}Sie betont jedes einzelne Wort.{/n} "Aber ich mache das nur, um die Dynastie zu retten."
languages.original_text: "Yes, I was the one who transmitted coordinates for air strikes to enemy troops. You have unmasked me. Are you satisfied?" {n}She enunciates each word crisply.{/n} "But know that I am doing this to save the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Ja, ich habe feindliche Truppen mit Koordinaten für Luftangriffe versorgt. Ihr habt mich durchschaut. Seid Ihr jetzt zufrieden?" {n}Sie betont jedes einzelne Wort.{/n} "Aber ich mache das nur, um die Dynastie zu retten."

languages.text: 「ええ、私は敵軍に空爆の座標を送ったのです。あなたは私を暴きました。満足ですか？」{n}彼女は言葉一つ一つをきっぱりと発音する。{/n}「でも、私は王朝を守るためにこれを行っていることを知ってください。」
languages.original_text: "Yes, I was the one who transmitted coordinates for air strikes to enemy troops. You have unmasked me. Are you satisfied?" {n}She enunciates each word crisply.{/n} "But know that I am doing this to save the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: 「ええ、私は敵軍に空爆の座標を送ったのです。あなたは私を暴きました。満足ですか？」{n}彼女は言葉一つ一つをきっぱりと発音する。{/n}「でも、私は王朝を守るためにこれを行っていることを知ってください。」
